capability: max_tokens, stop sequences, EOS stop behavior

harness.working_tree: Produced with the capability-conductor sampling + n_choices diff UNCOMMITTED on branch feat/capability-conductor (base 12f202d0). Re-seal against the commit once landed.

evidence.summary: e2e per row: max_tokens honored (n=3 each choice produced exactly 6 completion tokens, finish_reason "length") and EOS stop observed (1B/3B greedy halted at 3 tokens, finish_reason "stop"). Behavior (class-C) validated; bit-exact stop-parity vs llama.cpp not separately run.
